title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: Complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given.

questions.firstSentence: I haven't seen such a good film for ages.
questions.correct: a long time since I've seen
questions.explanation: The correct phrase is 'a long time since I've seen'.

questions.firstSentence: The last time I went to the cinema was months ago.
questions.secondSentence: I ........................ to the cinema for months.
